data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of tracking bookings by source (Instagram vs Facebook vs website). However, while there is evidence of bookings being tagged with 'Source: Instagram', there is no evidence provided that confirms bookings are tracked by both Instagram and Facebook, nor is there any mention of bookings from the website. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of bookings tracked from Facebook or website.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
